pi_items.source: Code analysis of export_result.sh which sets TARGET_FILE='/home/ga/Documents/MalwareAnalysis/dummy.pdf'
Code analysis of export_result.sh which sets TARGET_DIR='/home/ga/Documents/MalwareAnalysis'
curl check of the URL confirms it returns a real PDF from w3.org servers
Code analysis of export_result.sh which greps prefs.js for these exact user_pref settings

privileged_info_summary: The test artifact is a real dummy PDF retrieved directly from the w3.org WAI ER testing suite. The verification script (`export_result.sh`) enforces exactly the requested configuration parameters by explicitly checking `prefs.js` for `pdfjs.disabled=true`, `media.play-stand-alone=false`, `dom.event.clipboardevents.enabled=false`, and `browser.download.useDownloadDir=false`. It further verifies the successful creation of `/home/ga/Documents/MalwareAnalysis` and ensures the downloaded `dummy.pdf` file has been saved there.
